arts.sum: The return of the two players comes as a boost given Nunez has scored just three goals all season and has been criticised by fans for being wasteful in front of goal.

arts.sum: Liverpool manager Arne Slot confirms that Diogo Jota and Federico Chiesa could both return to the squad for Saturday's Premier League clash with Fulham.

arts.ttl: Man City repeat 115 charges stance as new statement made amid Liverpool wait
arts.sum: Manchester City continue to state their innocence as an independent panel begins to review their 115 charges of alleged financial misconduct against the Premier League

arts.sum: Michele Di Gregorio’s agent Carlo Alberto Belloni has told Tuttosport that the goalkeeper turned down Liverpool to join Juventus in the summer window. The Italian was at Monza over the last two seasons and his performances for them had caught Liverpool and Juve’s attention. arts.ttl: Arne Slot doubles down on Mo Salah contract saga with fresh Liverpool admission
arts.sum: Mo Salah's contract will expire in the summer, with Liverpool boss Arne Slot refusing to comment on the future of his star player despite mounting concern he could leave Anfield

arts.ttl: Diogo Jota to return as Arne Slot reveals when Federico Chiesa will play
arts.sum: But this week has seen both Jota and Chiesa rejoin full training as Liverpool’s medical staff oversee their recovery, and speaking in his pre-match press conference, Slot revealed they could both return against Fulham . “What he needs is playing time, and the problem is if you haven’t played for five or six months it’s sometimes difficult for a manager to give him his first minutes, because you don’t know exactly what you can expect.
